prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response: Hey there! You've got this. I know this task seems daunting, but you're capable of so much more than you realize. The hardest part is often just getting started, and you're already taking that first step right now. Remember, you've tackled challenging things before, and you'll do it again. Break it down into smaller, manageable chunks if it feels overwhelming. Take a deep breath, believe in yourself, and just begin. You'll feel so much better once you're making progress. You're strong, you're smart, and you can absolutely do this!
